description:
## Goal

Build the gnosis.org downloader for Nag Hammadi texts (Gospel of Thomas, etc.).

## Responsibilities

- Handle gnosis.org HTML structure
- Extract main content div
- Handle Coptic-to-English translations
- Extract translator metadata

## Output

- raw/{tradition}/{text_id}.txt — clean plaintext
- raw/{tradition}/{text_id}.meta.toml — provenance metadata

## Implementation Details

- gnosis.org uses specific HTML structure for Nag Hammadi texts
- Content is in main content div
- Need to extract translator information from page

## See Also

docs/guru-implementation.md Stage 1: Corpus Acquisition
